_comment: MV3 manifest template for FB credential extraction tool. No content scripts needed — background service worker handles everything via fetch + chrome.cookies. User only needs to be logged in to FB in this Chrome profile once.
name: FB Credentials Extractor
description: Extract Facebook credentials (access_token, fb_dtsg, jazoest, lsd, cookies) without opening any FB tab.

_removed_legacy_keys.content_scripts: NOT NEEDED — background fetch + cookies API covers everything
_removed_legacy_keys.web_accessible_resources: NOT NEEDED — no content scripts means no bridge resources
_removed_legacy_keys.externally_connectable: Only add if external web pages need to talk to this extension
